    Serialized Form

    • Package mosqueira.pureStream

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.MainFrame

        class MainFrame extends JFrame implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • bg
            PanelUtils bg
            Background container that paints the gradient theme and wraps the root panel.
          • crearM3U
            boolean crearM3U
            If true, the application appends downloaded files to an M3U playlist.
          • executablePath
            String executablePath
            Path to the yt-dlp executable configured by the user.
          • jmnMenu
            JMenuBar jmnMenu
          • jwtToken
            String jwtToken
            JWT token of the current cloud session (null when not logged in).
          • limitarVelocidad
            boolean limitarVelocidad
            If true, download rate limiting is enabled.
          • limiteVelocidad
            int limiteVelocidad
            Download speed limit in KB/s when rate limiting is enabled.
          • loggedUser
            mosqueira.mediaPollingClientComponent.model.Usuari loggedUser
            Logged user information returned by the cloud service (null when not logged in).
          • loginPanel
            LoginPanel loginPanel
          • mainPanel
            MainPanel mainPanel
          • mediaComponent1
            mosqueira.mediaPollingClientComponent.component.MediaPollingClientComponent mediaComponent1
          • mediaTableModel
            MediaTableModel mediaTableModel
            Shared table model used by panels that display downloaded media.
          • mniAbout
            JMenuItem mniAbout
          • mniExit
            JMenuItem mniExit
          • mniLogout
            JMenuItem mniLogout
          • mniPreferences
            JMenuItem mniPreferences
          • mnuEdit
            JMenu mnuEdit
          • mnuFile
            JMenu mnuFile
          • mnuHelp
            JMenu mnuHelp
          • panelLibrary
            LibraryPanel panelLibrary
          • pnlRoot
            JPanel pnlRoot
          • preferencesPanel
            PreferencesPanel preferencesPanel
          • rutaDescargas
            String rutaDescargas
            Default download folder path.

    • Package mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.MediaFileListRenderer

        class MediaFileListRenderer extends JPanel implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • lblIcon
            JLabel lblIcon
            Label used to display the media type icon.
          • lblPlay
            JLabel lblPlay
            Label used to display the play indicator icon.
          • lblState
            JLabel lblState
            Label used to display the current state (e.g., downloaded, pending, playing).
          • lblTitle
            JLabel lblTitle
            Label used to display the media title.

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.DesignApp.PanelUtils

        class PanelUtils extends JPanel implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • color1
            Color color1
            Primary color used in the gradient background. Defaults to white.
          • color2
            Color color2
            Secondary color used in the gradient background. Defaults to a dark navy tone (RGB 0, 38, 71).

        class AboutDialog extends JDialog implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • btnCloseAbout
            JButton btnCloseAbout

            JPanel jPanelRepaint
          • jScrollPane
            JScrollPane jScrollPane

            JSeparator jSeparatorTitle
          • jtextAbout1

    • Package mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile

        class MediaFile extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • dateDownloaded
            Date dateDownloaded
            Date when the file was downloaded (or registered in the library).
          • fileName
            String fileName
            The name of the media file (e.g., "video.mp4").
          • filePath
            String filePath
            Absolute file path on disk.
          • fileSizeBytes
            long fileSizeBytes
            File size in bytes.
          • mimeType
            String mimeType
            The MIME type of the file (e.g., "video/mp4", "audio/mpeg").
          • networkState
            String networkState
            Network status of the media file.

            Typical values are: "LOCAL", "NETWORK" or "BOTH".

          • remoteId
            Integer remoteId
            Remote identifier of this media file (if it exists in the remote library). May be null when the file is local-only.
          • uploadedBy
            String uploadedBy
            Username (or identifier) of the user who uploaded the file to the remote library. This value may be null for local-only files.

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaTableModel

        class MediaTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • columnNames
            String[] columnNames
            Column titles displayed in the JTable header.
          • mediaFiles
            List<MediaFile> mediaFiles
            Internal storage for table rows.

    • Package mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LibraryPanel

        class LibraryPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • allMediaFiles
            List<MediaFile> allMediaFiles
            Complete collection of media files stored in the library before applying any filter.
          • botMedia
            List<MediaFile> botMedia
            Collection of media files retrieved from bot or automated sources.

            JButton btnBack
          • btnDelete
            JButton btnDelete
          • btnDownloadFromCloud
            JButton btnDownloadFromCloud
          • btnSearch
            JButton btnSearch
          • btnUploadtoCloud

          • jcbFiltrados
            JComboBox<FilterType> jcbFiltrados
          • jListDownloads
            JList<MediaFile> jListDownloads
          • jScrollPane1
            JScrollPane jScrollPane1
          • jScrollTable
            JScrollPane jScrollTable
          • jSeparatorListDownload
            JSeparator jSeparatorListDownload
          • jtabSources
            JTabbedPane jtabSources
          • jTblDetails
            JTable jTblDetails
          • jtxtSearch
            JTextField jtxtSearch
          • listModel
            DefaultListModel<MediaFile> listModel
            List model used for the compact JList representation of media files.
          • mainFrame
            MainFrame mainFrame
            Reference to the main application frame. Used for navigation and panel switching.
          • netWorkMedia
            List<MediaFile> netWorkMedia
            Collection of media files retrieved from network sources.
          • tableModel
            MediaTableModel tableModel
            Table model used for the detailed JTable view of media files.

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.LoginPanel

        class LoginPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • btnLogin
            JButton btnLogin
            Button that triggers the login action.
          • chkRemember
            JCheckBox chkRemember
            Checkbox that enables persisting session data on this device.
          • jsonFile
            File jsonFile
            JSON file used to persist remembered credentials/token.
          • main
            MainFrame main
            Reference to the main application frame (used for navigation and token storage).
          • mapper
            tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper mapper
            JSON serializer/deserializer for LoginPanel.RememberData.
          • txtEmail
            JTextField txtEmail
            Text field where the user enters the email address.
          • txtPassword
            JPasswordField txtPassword
            Password input field for the user credentials.

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.MainPanel

        class MainPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • btnDownload
            JButton btnDownload
          • btnOpenLibrary
            JButton btnOpenLibrary
          • btnReproducir
            JButton btnReproducir
          • btnSearchFolderDownload
            JButton btnSearchFolderDownload
          • comboFormat
            JComboBox<String> comboFormat
          • comboQuality
            JComboBox<String> comboQuality
          • jfFormato2
            JSeparator jfFormato2
          • jScrollPane1
            JScrollPane jScrollPane1
          • jslFormato1
            JSeparator jslFormato1
          • jtxtFolderDownload
            JTextField jtxtFolderDownload
          • jtxtInsertUrl
            JTextField jtxtInsertUrl
          • jTxtLog
            JTextArea jTxtLog
          • lastDownloadedFile
            String lastDownloadedFile
            Absolute path of the last successfully downloaded media file.

            This value is used to enable automatic playback functionality after a download operation completes.

          • lblFormatoSalida1
            JLabel lblFormatoSalida1
          • lblQuality
            JLabel lblQuality
          • lblSelectFolderDownload
            JLabel lblSelectFolderDownload
          • lblUrl
            JLabel lblUrl
          • mainFrame
            MainFrame mainFrame
            Reference to the main application frame.

            Allows this panel to request view transitions and interact with other main-level components of the application.

          • preferencesPanel
            PreferencesPanel preferencesPanel
            Reference to the preferences panel.

            Used to retrieve and update user configuration such as the download directory, executable paths and other application settings.

          • progressBar
            JProgressBar progressBar
            Progress bar component used to display the status of ongoing download operations executed asynchronously.

      • Class mosqueira.pureStream.Paneles.PreferencesPanel

        class PreferencesPanel extends JPanel implements Serializable

          • lblAds
            JLabel lblAds

          • mainFrame
            MainFrame mainFrame
            Reference to the main application frame.

            Used to propagate configuration updates and trigger navigation or UI refresh when preferences are modified.
